synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-20956 Important: Oracle Linux 9 libtiff security update
description:
[4.4.0-15.2]
- fix CVE-2025-8176: tiffdither and tiffmedian skip first line of input
  images (RHEL-120239)

[4.4.0-15.1]
- fix CVE-2025-9900: buffer underflow crash in TIFFReadRGBAImageOriented
  (RHEL-112545)
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-20956

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-20956.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
libtiff-4.4.0-15.el9_7.2.i686.rpm
libtiff-4.4.0-15.el9_7.2.x86_64.rpm
libtiff-devel-4.4.0-15.el9_7.2.i686.rpm
libtiff-devel-4.4.0-15.el9_7.2.x86_64.rpm
libtiff-tools-4.4.0-15.el9_7.2.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
libtiff-4.4.0-15.el9_7.2.aarch64.rpm
libtiff-devel-4.4.0-15.el9_7.2.aarch64.rpm
libtiff-tools-4.4.0-15.el9_7.2.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/libtiff-4.4.0-15.el9_7.2.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-8176
CVE-2025-9900




Description of changes:

[4.4.0-15.2]
- fix CVE-2025-8176: tiffdither and tiffmedian skip first line of input
  images (RHEL-120239)

[4.4.0-15.1]
- fix CVE-2025-9900: buffer underflow crash in TIFFReadRGBAImageOriented
  (RHEL-112545)
